description_long: This is a robust axe featuring a dark, slightly curved wooden handle and a large, single-edged steel blade. The blade is broad and rectangular with a sharp, beveled edge and a pronounced beard, ideal for chopping or splitting wood. The head of the axe is secured to the handle with two visible metal fasteners, suggesting a sturdy, traditional mounting style. The handle has a natural wood grain texture and a rounded end for improved grip and control. The blade and mounting hardware are a matte, dark gray metal, contrasting with the rich brown of the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the axe.
description: A sturdy axe with a curved wooden handle and a large, single-edged steel blade, secured by two metal fasteners. The blade is broad and sharp, with a pronounced beard and matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the curved wooden handle and the broad, sharp-edged steel blade.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the rounded end of the handle, with two metal fasteners visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the blade's beard and the handle's curvature, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle, with the mounting hardware visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded end, natural wood grain, and oval cross-section for ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, single-edged steel blade with a sharp beveled edge and pronounced beard; rectangular profile with a flat poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional mounting with two visible metal fasteners securing the blade to the handle.
